channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Direct Flights Make Perth an Accessible and Unique Destination for South Africans
item.description: Perth, Western Australia’s western capital, has become much more accessible to South African travellers with the introduction of a direct flight from Johannesburg. The nine-hour journey opens up a sid...

item.title: Clash breaks out between BJP and TMC supporters in West Bengal; Rahul Gandhi to launch Kerala poll campaign
item.description: In the latest election developments across India, clashes erupted between supporters of the BJP and the TMC in West Bengal, leading to a strong security presence to control the situation. Meanwhile, t...

item.title: Exploring Vulnerability and Independence in Shunali Khullar Shroff’s ‘The Wrong Way Home’
item.description: Shunali Khullar Shroff’s novel The Wrong Way Home centres on Nayantara (Nayan), a forty-year-old divorced woman navigating emotional uncertainty and professional instability in modern Mumbai. Despite ...

item.title: Nonprofits and airport communities provide food aid to unpaid TSA officers during partial DHS shutdown
item.description: Across the United States, nonprofits, unions, and airport communities are stepping in to support Transportation Security Administration (TSA) officers who have been working without full pay for over a...

item.title: Ottawa Senators defeat Toronto Maple Leafs 5-2 with early dominance
item.description: The Ottawa Senators delivered a strong performance against their provincial rivals, the Toronto Maple Leafs, securing a 5-2 victory on Saturday night. The Senators established control early, scoring t...

item.title: Kiambu Couple Strengthens Marriage by Working Together in Transport SACCO
item.description: In Kiambu county, Jane and Peter, a devoted Akorino couple, are showing Kenyans how couples can thrive by working together. Married for over 13 years, they both operate in the same matatu SACCO, with ...

item.title: Trump Issues 48-Hour Ultimatum to Iran to Reopen Strait of Hormuz or Face Strikes on Power Plants Amid Escalating Conflict
item.description: The ongoing war involving Iran, Israel, and the United States has intensified significantly. On March 21, 2026, U.S. President Donald Trump issued a strong warning on social media, threatening to 'obl...

item.title: Gabriel Magalhães expresses enthusiasm for facing Erling Haaland in Carabao Cup final
item.description: Arsenal centre-back Gabriel Magalhães has spoken about his excitement ahead of the Carabao Cup final against Manchester City at Wembley on Sunday. The Brazilian defender, who leads Arsenal's backline,...

item.title: TECNO Launches CAMON 50 Series with Advanced AI Camera Features and Productivity Tools
item.description: TECNO don launch the CAMON 50 Series, wey include CAMON 50, CAMON 50 Pro, and CAMON 50 Ultra 5G. This new smartphones dem dey focus on strong camera work, smart AI features, fine design, and solid dur...

item.title: Glucose Goddess shares essential choline, protein and omega-3 advice for pregnant women to support baby’s brain and lifelong health
item.description: Jessie Inchauspé, known as the Glucose Goddess, draws on her personal experience of a silent miscarriage to highlight how maternal nutrition during pregnancy profoundly influences a child’s future phy...

item.title: Harvard team develops tunable chip for real‑time control of light chirality
item.description: Engineers at the Harvard John A. Paulson School of Engineering and Applied Sciences have developed a miniature chip that can dynamically twist and tune the handedness of light as it passes through the...

item.title: Australian Muslims Celebrate Eid Amid Worries Over Family in Middle East
item.description: This year's Eid al-Fitr celebrations in Australia are marked by a sense of anxiety for many Muslims, as the Middle East is engulfed in conflict. The holiday, which marks the end of Ramadan, is traditi...

item.title: AmaZulu edge Polokwane City 1-0 in tight Premiership clash
item.description: Polokwane City suffered a disappointing 1-0 defeat at home against AmaZulu in a Betway Premiership match on Saturday. Despite dominating much of the game and creating several scoring opportunities, in...

item.title: Dele Sobowale critiques Trump's Iran war approach as morally disastrous and globally isolating for America
item.description: In this sharp column, Dele Sobowale lambast President Trump for him ongoing war with Iran, saying say America dey win the military side but dey lose the whole world moral and economic wise. He compare...

item.title: Rising Oil Prices May Lead to Higher Comelec Costs for BARMM Elections
item.description: The Commission on Elections (Comelec) may face a 25% increase in its expenses for the upcoming elections in the Bangsamoro Autonomous Region in Muslim Mindanao (BARMM) due to the rising cost of fuel. ...

item.title: Understanding ASUU’s Role in University Governance and Nigeria’s Education Crisis
item.description: The crisis within Nigeria’s public university system has been ongoing for decades, largely due to recurring strikes by the Academic Staff Union of Universities (ASUU). These strikes disrupt academic s...

item.title: Beef and other meat prices rise ahead of Easter due to ongoing supply shortages
item.description: Canadian shoppers are facing higher costs for their Easter meals in 2026, driven primarily by surging beef prices and increases in pork and chicken. According to the latest consumer price index data, ...

item.title: Important updates in the search for Nancy Guthrie after her disappearance
item.description: The search for 84-year-old Nancy Guthrie, mother of 'Today' show host Savannah Guthrie, has now entered its seventh week. Nancy vanished from her Tucson, Arizona, home on January 31, possibly kidnappe...

item.title: How Blended Capital is Driving Kenya’s Digital Infrastructure and Growth
item.description: Kenya’s digital economy has grown fast over the last ten years, largely thanks to mobile money, fintech, and tech-enabled services in health, education and commerce. But this rapid growth is putting p...

item.title: Raila Odinga sio sasa, kwa nini kiongozi kama yeye wanachomesha
item.description: Katika makala haya, mwandishi analisisi kama vile “ukomeshaji” kwa Raila Odinga umeweka kiongozi kama yeye wanaishawishi siasa ya Kenya kama kabla. Baada ya kumalizika kipengele kikubwa cha kiongozi w...
